nodes.label: AI for menial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to use it for the more menial tasks I do like creating invoices, writing generic emails to clients, or organizing client lists/bookkeeping

nodes.label: AI for data analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I used Ai to do my business analytics... Being able to see the data presented visually/graphically allowed me to notice trends I hadn't before

nodes.label: Full automation of business tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I would love to be able to give the AI the names of the company's and have it find me their business emails for me, and even automate the process of sending out the emails in gmail

nodes.label: Human creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I can say almost certainly that I wouldn't want AI involved in the actual creation process for me

nodes.label: AI as supplemental tool
nodes.grounding_span: I don't know which programs would fit what I need and how much they would all cost. With cost I don't know that it would be worth it for me

nodes.label: Personal creative skill development
nodes.grounding_span: This leaves me time to do the creative part myself

nodes.label: Business efficiency and cost-effectiveness
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to see trends for the whole year and compare it to previous years

nodes.label: Strategic client matching
nodes.grounding_span: I search for clients whose products fit work I've done or want to get into

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for marketing research
nodes.grounding_span: I found it really informative when I used Ai to do my business analytics

nodes.label: Desire for fuller automation
nodes.grounding_span: I would love to be able to give the AI the names of the company's and have it find me their business emails

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I can say almost certainly that I wouldn't want AI involved in the actual creation process for me

nodes.label: Hesitation due to cost uncertainty
nodes.grounding_span: With cost I don't know that it would be worth it for me

nodes.label: Strategic task delegation — uses AI only for specific, bounded tasks
nodes.grounding_span: This leaves me time to do the creative part myself

nodes.label: Independent exploration and self-directed learning about AI
nodes.grounding_span: I've been figuring it out on my own!
